languages.text: "Оно того не стоит. Можно пытаться продлять существование безгранично, но после какого-то момента его едва можно будет назвать жизнью".
"It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."
languages.original_text: "Оно того не стоит. Можно пытаться продлять существование безгранично, но после какого-то момента его едва можно будет назвать жизнью".

traits.locale_text: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."
"It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."
"It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."

languages.text: "Das ist es nicht wert. Ihr könnt versuchen, eine Existenz unbegrenzt zu verlängern, aber ab einem gewissen Punkt kann man eine solche Existenz wohl kaum noch Leben nennen."
languages.original_text: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist es nicht wert. Ihr könnt versuchen, eine Existenz unbegrenzt zu verlängern, aber ab einem gewissen Punkt kann man eine solche Existenz wohl kaum noch Leben nennen."

languages.text: « Ça n'en vaut pas la peine. On peut tenter de prolonger une existence indéfiniment, mais passé un certain stade, ça ne mérite même plus d'être appelé une vie. »
languages.original_text: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."

traits.locale_text: « Ça n'en vaut pas la peine. On peut tenter de prolonger une existence indéfiniment, mais passé un certain stade, ça ne mérite même plus d'être appelé une vie. »

languages.text: “这不值得。你或许可以设法无限延长‘存在’，但一旦越过某个界限，这种存在便难以再被称为‘生命’。”
languages.original_text: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."

traits.locale_text: “这不值得。你或许可以设法无限延长‘存在’，但一旦越过某个界限，这种存在便难以再被称为‘生命’。”

languages.text: «No merece la pena. Puede intentar prolongar la existencia de forma indefinida, pero, pasado cierto punto, ya no se podría llamar vida a lo que queda».
languages.original_text: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."

traits.locale_text: «No merece la pena. Puede intentar prolongar la existencia de forma indefinida, pero, pasado cierto punto, ya no se podría llamar vida a lo que queda».

languages.text: 「その価値はない。存在を際限なく引き延ばすことはできるが、ある一線を越えれば、そのような存在はもはや生命とは呼べまい。」
languages.original_text: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."

traits.locale_text: 「その価値はない。存在を際限なく引き延ばすことはできるが、ある一線を越えれば、そのような存在はもはや生命とは呼べまい。」

languages.text: "Buna değmez. Varoluşu süresiz olarak uzatmaya çalışabiliriz ancak belirli bir noktadan sonra böyle bir varoluşa yaşam demek zor olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "It's not worth it. You can try to prolong existence indefinitely, but after a certain point, such existence can scarcely be called life."

traits.locale_text: "Buna değmez. Varoluşu süresiz olarak uzatmaya çalışabiliriz ancak belirli bir noktadan sonra böyle bir varoluşa yaşam demek zor olacaktır."
